description_long: This is a three-armed candelabrum-style lamp with a central vertical column and two symmetrical, outward-curving arms, each ending in a cup-shaped holder. The lamp is constructed from a material resembling polished brass or gold, giving it a warm metallic sheen. The central stem is faceted and tapers at both ends, with a broad, stable base and a matching cup at the top. The arms are gently undulating, adding a decorative flourish to the otherwise geometric design. The lamp is designed to hold three light sources, one at the top of the central column and one at the end of each arm. Its overall appearance is both elegant and functional, suitable for urban parks, plazas, or upscale public spaces.
description: A gold-toned, three-armed candelabrum lamp with a faceted central column and cup-shaped holders, designed for decorative urban settings.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all three arms and cup holders symmetrically, highlighting the lamp's full width and decorative arms.
description_view_1: Side view showing the lamp's narrow profile, with only the central column and one cup visible, arms aligned front-to-back.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying all three arms and cup holders symmetrically.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the lamp's narrow profile with the central column and one cup visible.
